waiver.reason_summary: All gate failures in this run are pre-existing on the target branch and demonstrably unrelated to the commits being pushed; the author has verified no new regressions were introduced.
waiver.detail: ADR 0370 exact-main closeout fixes the direct ws-0370 gate regressions (missing live-apply receipts and generated Prometheus file_sd artifacts), but primary-branch pre-push validation still fails on pre-existing mainline issues outside this workstream, including baseline ansible-lint debt and the integration-test runner missing httpx in the local fallback environment.
